senses.definition: used to suggest that everything has its own appropriate time or occasion, and that it is important to respect the natural order of things
used to express the idea that there is a suitable or compatible match for every person or situation

examples.x: After several failed relationships, she began to lose hope, but her friend reminded her that every pot has its lid and that she will find the right partner someday.
The hiring manager was confident that he would find the right candidate for the job, as every pot has its lid.
